rows.gate_reason: selective candidate hosts exist but all require manual license review before activation
network adapters are policy-bound but not attached to a live scheduler runtime
social/column hosts remain review-only and are excluded from activation promotion

interpretation: Selective network activation is no longer a vague future task; it is blocked by two explicit gates: license review and runtime scheduler activation.
This separates legitimate T2/T3 article activation candidates from permanently review-only social hosts.
